import { Button, FormHelperText, MenuItem, TextField } from '@material-ui/core' import axios from 'axios' import React, { useState } from 'react' import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom' export default function CreateAdmin() { const history = useNavigate(); const [data, setData] = useState({ firstName: '', middleName: '', lastName: '', studentID: '', password: '' }) const handleChange = (event) => { const name = event.target.name; const value = event.target.value; setData(data => ({...data, [name]: value})); } const handleSubmit = (event) => { event.preventDefault(); const sendData = { firstName:data.firstName, middleName:data.middleName, lastName:data.lastName, studentID:data.studentID, password:data.password } axios.post('http://localhost:80/api/register.php', sendData) .then((result) => { console.log(result.data) }) .catch(err => console.log(err)) }; const [position, setPosition] = useState('Student') const [studentPosition, setStudentPosition] = useState(false) const [teacherPosition, setTeacherPosition] = useState(false) const handleChangeSelect = (event) => { setPosition(event.target.value); if(event.target.value === 'Student') { setStudentPosition(true) setTeacherPosition(false) } else if (event.target.value === 'Teacher') { setStudentPosition(false) setTeacherPosition(true) } else if (event.target.value === 'Admin') { setStudentPosition(false) setTeacherPosition(false) } } return (
